interviews.resume_text:
Sri Kiran Guttula     8143684699   #   2420600022mca@gmail.com   +   Hyderabad, Telangana  ï   linkedin.com/in/srikiranguttula   §   github.com/Freeze-22      credly.com/users/sri-kiran  Career Objective  Motivated MCA student seeking opportunities in   Software Engineering ,   AI Engineering , and   Cloud Engineering , with a strong foundation in programming, machine learning, and cloud technologies.  Education  Koneru Lakshmaiah Education Foundation (Deemed University)   2024 – 2026  Master of Computer Applications (MCA) — CGPA:   9.37   Hyderabad, TG  Presidency College, Bengaluru City University   2019 – 2022  Bachelor of Computer Applications (BCA) — CGPA:   8.01   Bengaluru, KA  Experience  AI Developer Intern   May 2025 – Jul 2025  Viswam.AI   Hyderabad, TG  •   Developed a   Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG)   based project, enhancing solution efficiency through advanced prompt engineering and real-world testing.  •   Collaborated on   Resume Radar , an ATS-like application for automating resume analysis and ranking; identified bugs and contributed via GitLab merge requests.  Recruitment Operations Executive   Apr 2023 – May 2024  Nisum Consulting Private Limited   Hyderabad, TG  •   Managed end-to-end hiring logistics across multiple regions using   Lever ATS ; extracted and transformed recruitment data into actionable reports for leadership.  •   Visualized recruitment trends, pipeline velocity, and candidate metrics via   Looker Studio   dashboards; optimized workflows using   GSuite   across global time zones.  Projects  OffGen: Offline AI-Powered Full Stack Generator   |   Python, FastAPI, React.js, Ollama, SQLite, WebSockets   Solo Project  •   Built an offline AI-powered full stack web application generator inspired by Replit and Bolt.new, generating complete   React + FastAPI + SQLite   projects from natural language prompts without internet connectivity.  •   Designed a   multi-stage LLM pipeline   (planning   →   database   →   backend   →   frontend   →   infra) with a self-interview engine using   Phi-3 Mini + Qwen2.5-Coder   via Ollama, optimized for resource-constrained hardware (8GB RAM, 2GB VRAM).  •   Implemented real-time   WebSocket streaming   for live generation progress and a   Monaco Editor -based IDE interface with file tree, syntax highlighting, and iterative chat-based refinement panel.  •   Engineered smart   context selection   and project versioning with rollback — enabling unlimited iterative refinement via natural language without regenerating from scratch; published as   IEEE research paper .  RAG Q&A Chatbot   |   Python, Streamlit, ChromaDB, Gemini API, Tiktoken, MarkItDown   Solo Project  •   Built a   Retrieval Augmented Generation   chatbot supporting multi-format document ingestion (PDF, Word, Excel, PPT) using   MarkItDown   parsing and   Tiktoken -based overlapping chunk splitting.  •   Implemented semantic search using   ChromaDB   with   all-MiniLM-L6-v2   sentence transformer embeddings, retrieving top-k relevant chunks as context for   Gemini API   powered question answering.  •   Built two-page   Streamlit   UI — document ingestion page and interactive chatbot page — with persistent vector storage across sessions using   ChromaDB PersistentClient .  Smart Crop Advisory System   |   Node.js, Express, React.js, MongoDB, TensorFlow.js, Docker   Team of 3  •   Developed full-stack crop advisory platform with   React.js + Tailwind CSS   frontend and   Node.js + Express.js   backend integrated with   TensorFlow.js   for ML inference.  •   Implemented secure JWT authentication, real-time notifications via   Socket.io , multilingual support, and PDF generation for reports.  •   Containerized application with   Docker , deployed on   AWS EC2 & S3   with   GitHub Actions   CI/CD pipeline.  EduConnect Platform   |   Node.js, Express, React.js, MongoDB, Docker   Team of 4  •   Built a full-stack educational platform with   React.js + Tailwind CSS   frontend and   Node.js + Express.js   backend featuring real-time collaboration via   Socket.io   and secure JWT authentication.  •   Engineered backend with   MongoDB   database, RESTful APIs, file uploads to   AWS S3 , and email notifications using  Nodemailer .  •   Deployed with   Docker   containerization,   GitHub Actions   CI/CD pipeline, and hosted on   AWS EC2 .  Technical Skills  Languages:   C, C++, Java, Python, R  Web:   HTML, CSS, JavaScript, React.js, Tailwind CSS, REST APIs  Databases:   MongoDB, SQLite, PostgreSQL  Frameworks:   Flask, SQLAlchemy, TensorFlow.js, Git, GitLab  Cloud:   AWS, Microsoft Azure

Certifications  AWS Certified Cloud Practitioner   — Amazon Web Services   Feb 2026  AWS Certified AI Practitioner   — Amazon Web Services   Feb 2026  Microsoft AI Fundamentals (AI-900)   — Microsoft   Nov 2025  Achievements & Languages  CodeChef:   3-Star rating on competitive programming platform  Hackathons:   Participated in multiple national & college-level hackathons  Typing Speed:   80+ WPM with 100% accuracy (MonkeyType)  Languages Known:   English, Hindi, Telugu

interviews.job_description:
Embark on a transformative journey as a Software Engineer within Apple's Applied Machine Learning Team. You will assume a pivotal role in building and supporting the high-performance, scalable enterprise platforms that underpin our Search, Knowledge Graph, ML and inferencing systems. You shall be entrusted with the stewardship of ensuring unparalleled availability, optimal performance, and minimal latency for our high-throughput applications, thereby directly influencing and elevating the customer experience.

Your responsibilities will encompass the development and optimal functioning of diverse workloads across ML/KG/Inference platforms, coupled with the exploration of, and building deep understanding of latest open source technologies and innovative solutions. A proven aptitude for outstanding interpersonal communication, a high degree of accountability and the capacity to collaborate seamlessly across multifaceted business and technical teams are paramount.

strengths: Attempted to engage with all questions
report_json.summary: The candidate demonstrated honesty and basic knowledge. Report was generated in fallback mode — try again for full AI analysis.
